title: xyris subulata var. subulata
intro: Xyris subulata var. subulata, commonly known as the needle-flower or grass spike-rush, is a perennial herb belonging to the Xyridaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Xyris subulata var. subulata include the treatment of skin conditions, wound healing, and the reduction of fever. The plant is typically prepared for herbal use through infusion or decoction of its leaves, with the resulting liquid used to treat various ailments.
